title: OpenAI Partners With Amazon on Stateful AI Agent Runtime for AWS Bedrock
description: Tony Kim Mar 19, 2026 00:33 OpenAI and Amazon announce joint Stateful Runtime Environment for Amazon Bedrock, enabling persistent multi-step AI agent workflows with enterprise governance. OpenAI and Amazon Web Services have unveiled a joint collaboration bringing a new Stateful Runtime Environment to Amazon Bedrock, marking a significant expansion of OpenAI’s enterprise reach into AWS [...]

title: OpenAI Partners With Amazon on Stateful AI Agent Runtime for AWS Bedrock
description: OpenAI and Amazon announce joint Stateful Runtime Environment for Amazon Bedrock, enabling persistent multi-step AI agent workflows with enterprise governance. (Read More)

title: Val Kilmer to appear posthumously through AI in As Deep as the Grave
description: LOS ANGELES--Actor Val Kilmer will posthumously appear in what First Line Films calls a first-ever performance enabled by generative artificial intelligence in the upcoming film "As Deep as the Grave," the production company announced on Wednesday.

title: AI Brings Val Kilmer Back to the Big Screen a Year After His Death
description: Kilmer's estate approves plans to use generative AI to resurrect the late actor for a role in the historical drama As Deep As the Grave.
